title: Cheap Pleasure Steals Your Frame | Ferrum Doctrine Stickman
description:
You cannot lead a room when your nervous system is rented by cheap hits.

Thirty days without your cheapest hit. Or stay sedated. Decide.

Ferrum Doctrine — stickman combat lessons for men who want standards.

pinned_comment: You either do the demand or stay weak. Decide. Full channel: The Tyrrell Codex / Ferrum Doctrine.
